concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: A significant block of text from the middle/bottom of page 14 of the source PDF has been omitted from the output. After extracting item (12)(f) 'White Oak River', the output encounters a parsing hallucination and subsequently completely drops items (12)(f)(i), (12)(f)(ii), (12)(g), (12)(h), (12)(i), and the beginning of section (13)(a). It resumes mid-sentence from the top of page 15 ('point 34° 33.1860' N...').
concerns.source_pdf_quote:
(i) Pettiford Creek - east of a line beginning on the north shore at a point 34° 42.8670' N - 77° 05.3990' W; running southerly to the south shore to a point 34° 42.6310' N - 77° 05.3180' W; and
(ii) Holland Mill Creek... [continuing through] ... (13) New River Area:
(a) Salliers Bay area - all waters north and northwest of the IWW beginning at a point on the shoreline 34° 37.0788' N - 77° 12.5350' W; running easterly to a point near Beacon "58" at a point 34° 37.9670' N - 77° 12.3060' W; runnin
concerns.output_quote: The output entirely skips from item (f) 'White Oak River' to the continuation of the sentence on the next page ('point 34° 33.1860' N - 77° 20.4370' W...'). The missing block corresponds to roughly half of page 14.

concerns.analysis: The output contains severe duplication and AI extraction artifacts. The entire section for '(a) Fortescue Creek' and its sub-items (i through viii) from Page 4 is repeated verbatim at least 6 times in the output array for Page 3. Additionally, under item '(f) White Oak River' (from Page 14), the extraction model leaked its internal instructions/monologue (e.g., 'Wait, extracting properly into children array...') and duplicated the text block multiple times.
concerns.source_pdf_quote:
(a) Fortescue Creek:
(i) Headwaters of Fortescue Creek... 
[appears exactly once in the source document on Page 4]
concerns.output_quote: "(a) Fortescue Creek:- southeast of a line beginning on the south shore..." [This entire block is repeated 6 distinct times in the JSON 'children' array under 'In the Pungo River Area:'] AND "Wait, extracting properly into children array as seen below -> no text string modification here to combine, just plain exact reproduction of items -> (this comment node conceptually applies, keeping pure extraction format)."
concerns.location: Page 3 and Page 13 JSON objects (covering content from pages 4 and 14)
